item.name: Twig Catfish
item.description:
This long, bony catfish is commonly found nibbling on algae and other plants.

[Suitable for printing on medium canvases.]

fish.guide: It is said that this thin brown fish evolved to resemble a fallen branch or tree root in order to evade predators. Its algae-based diet helps to “clean up” the water in which it resides.
